metadata.title: How a Quick Mid Peek Turned Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Caught two enemies off guard with a fast mid peek and sharp shots. Timing and positioning made this play work smoothly. What’s your favorite way to control mid?

Drop a comment with your best mid control trick!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Drop a comment with your best mid control trick!
